name: Upgrade Guard
description: Safe OpenClaw upgrades with snapshot, pre-flight checks, controlled upgrade, post-verification, and emergency rollback. Comprehensive 6-step workflow with watchdog self-healing. Never lose a working system to a bad update.
review: Production-ready infrastructure tooling for safe OpenClaw upgrades. Comprehensive 6-step workflow with watchdog self-healing makes this a must-have for anyone running OpenClaw in production environments.
